interfaces.name: getChaletSearchDefaults
interfaces.description: Get default values for chalet search widgets (used on Home and Chalet Search pages).

interfaces.name: getChaletFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for chalet search (price ranges, amenities, bedrooms, distance to ski lifts).

interfaces.name: getChaletSortOptions
interfaces.description: Get available sort options for chalet search results.

interfaces.name: searchAvailableChalets
interfaces.description: Search chalets by dates, guests, filters, and sorting, returning pricing and key attributes for the selected stay.

price_per_night_for_dates.description: Effective nightly price for the selected stay

is_favorited.description: Whether this chalet is in the user's favorites

interfaces.name: getChaletDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a chalet, including pricing for optional selected dates and guests.

interfaces.name: toggleFavoriteChalet
interfaces.description: Add or remove a chalet from the user's favorites.

favorite_id.description: ID of FavoriteChalet record when favorited

favorites_count.description: Total number of favorited chalets after the change

interfaces.name: getFavoriteChalets
interfaces.description: Get the full list of chalets the user has favorited, with key details for comparison and booking.

interfaces.name: getHomepagePromotions
interfaces.description: Get promotional content for the homepage, including featured chalets and curated store bundles.

interfaces.name: getChaletBookingFormData
interfaces.description: Get pre-filled booking form data and a price quote for a chalet for given dates and guests.

interfaces.name: submitChaletBookingForm
interfaces.description: Submit the chalet booking form to create a pending booking and move to the review step.

interfaces.name: getBookingReview
interfaces.description: Get booking details for the review page, including policies and check-in/check-out times.

interfaces.name: confirmBooking
interfaces.description: Confirm a pending booking, finalize totals, and return the confirmation with reference code.

interfaces.name: getTopLevelStoreCategories
interfaces.description: Get top-level store categories for Store home and navigation (Grocery & Essentials, Winter Gear, Fireplace & Comfort, etc.).

interfaces.name: getStoreCategoryFilters
interfaces.description: Get category-specific filter options such as price range, rating, shipping options, and subcategories.

interfaces.name: listStoreProducts
interfaces.description: List products in a store category with optional subcategory and filters applied.

parameters.name: subcategoryKey
parameters.description: Optional subcategory or product_type key, e.g., 'ski_gloves', 'beanie', 'socks', 'thermal_wear'

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full product details including variants, ratings, and chalet delivery eligibility.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured product to the cart (creates the cart internally if it does not exist). Handles variants and digital gift card configuration.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents, totals, and delivery context.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an existing cart item and return the updated cart.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and return the updated cart.

interfaces.name: setCartDeliveryContext
interfaces.description: Set delivery option, chalet, and delivery date for the cart, supporting chalet fridge stocking and deliver-to-chalet flows.

parameters.name: deliveryDate
parameters.description: ISO date for physical delivery, e.g., check-in day or next Saturday

interfaces.name: createOrderFromCart
interfaces.description: Create a draft order from the current cart and return order summary for checkout.

interfaces.name: updateOrderDeliveryOptions
interfaces.description: Update order delivery options during checkout (chalet selection, delivery date, method).

interfaces.name: updateOrderPurchaserDetails
interfaces.description: Update purchaser details (name, billing address, email) for an order during checkout.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get full checkout summary for an order, including items, subtotal, delivery method, and totals.

interfaces.name: getPaymentMethods
interfaces.description: Get enabled payment methods for the payment selection step of checkout.

interfaces.name: lookupBookingByReference
interfaces.description: Look up a booking using reference code and last name for the Manage Booking page.

interfaces.name: getBookingDetailsWithExtras
interfaces.description: Get full booking details including any existing extras for the Booking Details & Extras page.

interfaces.name: getAvailableStayExtras
interfaces.description: Get the list of stay extras that can be added to a booking (airport transfer, daily breakfast, late checkout).

interfaces.name: updateBookingExtras
interfaces.description: Add, modify, or remove extras for a booking and return updated totals, helping users stay within their extras budget.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including brand story, mission, and local area highlights.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact information and response expectations for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form for general inquiries, booking questions, or store order issues.

interfaces.name: getFaqEntries
interfaces.description: Get FAQ entries covering chalet bookings, store operations, gift vouchers, and booking modifications.

interfaces.name: getPolicies
interfaces.description: Get policy documents for bookings, privacy, store returns, and gift vouchers for the Policies page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current single-user cart or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateChaletStayPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate nightly and total pricing for a chalet given dates and guests.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, shipping, tax, and total after cart changes.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateBookingExtrasTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate extras_total and grand_total for a booking after extras changes.
